mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_pw, user_name, TO_CHAR(birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS birth, gender, phone, address, is_admin, member_status FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND member_status = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APPLY A JOIN POST P ON A.P_NUMBER = P.P_NUMBER WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND P.P_TYPE = 'V' AND A.A_STATE = 'Y'
AND P.P_DATE >= SYSDATE
AND P.P_DATE < SYSDATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND P_STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT P.P_NUMBER, P.P_TITLE, U.USER_NAME, TO_CHAR(A.A_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') C_DATE, CEIL( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST WHERE P_NUMBER >= P.P_NUMBER AND P_TYPE = 'V') / 10.0 ) AS PAGE_NUM FROM APPLY A JOIN POST P ON A.P_NUMBER = P.P_NUMBER JOIN USERS U ON P.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND P.P_TYPE = 'V' AND A.A_STATE = 'Y'
AND P.P_DATE >= SYSDATE
AND P.P_DATE < SYSDATE
ORDER BY A.A_NUMBER DESC

SELECT P.P_NUMBER, P.P_TITLE, U.USER_NAME, TO_CHAR(P.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') CREATE_DATE, P.P_TYPE, CASE P.P_TYPE WHEN 'V' THEN CEIL( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST WHERE P_NUMBER >= P.P_NUMBER AND P_TYPE = 'V') / 10.0 ) WHEN 'R' THEN CEIL( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST WHERE P_NUMBER >= P.P_NUMBER AND P_TYPE = 'R') / 10.0 ) END AS PAGE_NUM FROM POST P JOIN USERS U ON P.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE P.USER_ID = #{userId} AND P.P_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY P.P_NUMBER DESC
SELECT user_id, user_pw, user_name, TO_CHAR(birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS birth, gender, phone, address, is_admin, member_status FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
select count(*) from users where user_Id = #{val}
